Developer of a predictive analytics platform designed to provide businesses with clear insights on how to expand their operations. The company's platform considers multiple retail-specific metrics to leverage all business retail data from a top-level overview of the business to visual item reporting, drill-down analysis, and ad-hoc reporting, enabling retail businesses to reduce the time spent in making key performance indicators.

name: 99.co
description: Operator of an online property listing marketplace intended for sale and rent. The company's platform offers a map-based property search engine that uses algorithms, enabling customers to find houses, condominiums, and apartments for sale and rental purposes.

name: 99 Minutos
description: Operator of an e-commerce logistics platform intended to simplify the delivery burden of online retail orders. The company specializes in delivering online shopping products with real-time global positioning system (GPS) tracking and efficient routing within Mexico, Chile, Perú, and Colombia, enabling e-commerce companies to deliver the product at a low cost.

name: AngelCam
description: Developer of an IP camera integration platform designed to make network cameras smarter for streaming live videos and audio. The company's IP camera integration platform offers a plug and play connection for various camera brands and a cloud-based application store for companies to build different applications for real-time audio and video analysis, enabling owners to connect multiple devices to the cloud, view the real-time footage on one place, from any device, anytime.

name: Appionics
description: Developer of non-fungible token (NFT) platform and related applications intended to provide digital property rights services to gamers and internet users. The company leverages gamification and blockchain to develop and market a portfolio of mobile applications, games and also additional products orientated to educational learning, ensuring transparency, security and new business models, enabling users to trade and exchange digital property.

name: AppZen
description: Developer of spend-to-pay software designed to automate manual processes, uncover problems, and optimize decision-making for modern finance teams. The company's platform combines patented deep learning, computer vision, and semantic analysis with intelligence from thousands of online data sources to understand financial transactions in a business context and make decisions before those transactions happen, enabling clients to reduce spending, comply with the policy, and streamline the process.

name: Avegant
description: Developer of light field display technology designed for mixed-reality applications. The company's platform offers displays that can enable the visualization of virtual objects across multiple focal planes, replicating the way to view natural objects and enhancing the artificial intelligence journey, enabling users to change how people learn, play, work, and interact with each other through augmented reality experiences.

name: Wuzzuf
description: BasharSoft operates Wuzzuf and Forasna, two of the largest job platforms in Egypt and across MENA

name: MommaZoo
description: Developer of a cloud-optimized blockchain platform designed to easily build blockchain applications. The company's platform offers a multi-payment system with cloud infrastructure and robust data stores, enabling blockchain application developers to build only the layers of the application and cryptocurrency wallets which can be run across multiple data centers eliminating the process of rebuilding from scratch.

name: LexSpot
description: Developer of a corporate immigration platform designed to manage and simplify immigration policies and needs. The company's platform offers consultation and guidance to fill out the American immigration application form and offers to execute efficient and organized processes that provide a good experience to international employees and also run a proactive and informed function, enabling companies to achieve their global talent goals.

name: Brandtrack
description: Operator of a background music platform intended to help in creating and composing background music. The company's platform helps in managing the musicalization of multiple commercial spaces and is offered in conjunction with a personalized musical selection that seeks to enhance consumer experiences, enabling businesses to choose and compose background pieces of music while showcasing their products and attracting more customers.

name: Bukalapak
description: PT Bukalapak.com Tbk is a trusted online shopping site in Indonesia that sells a variety of products that are needed by Indonesian people. It offers electronic, cosmetic, apparel and various other products.

name: CareGuide
description: Operator of an online care provider marketplace intended to match families with care providers through a portfolio of websites. The company's marketplace offers senior care, child care, pet care and home care services, enabling customers to find local care providers, including nannies, babysitters, pet sitters, elder-care providers and house sitters.

name: Carelulu
description: Operator of an online marketplace designed to ensure every child has access to safe, affordable, high-quality child care and early education. The company's marketplace connects parents to licensed daycares and preschools and offers a criteria-based search and detailed information on childcare providers such as cost, hours, photos, and verified reviews, enabling parents to find safe and affordable childcare and early education for their kids.

name: Cargobase
description: Developer of a SaaS-based logistics platform designed to automate all procurement and freight management processes between enterprise shippers and logistics providers. The company's platform helps enterprise shippers to reduce logistics spending and save time with quoting, booking, management, and analysis of on-demand air, ocean, parcel, rail, and road shipments from their private pool of logistics providers, enabling clients to manage on-demand freight effectively.

name: Chaldal
description: Operator of an online shopping platform intended to offer groceries and daily essential products. The company's platform offers baby products, personal care products, pet food and groceries, enabling customers to buy goods of their own choice and get them delivered to their doorstep.

name: ChannelMeter
description: Developer of brand influencer management platform designed to offer online video marketing services. The company's platform discovers talent, onboards influencers, tracks campaigns, data analytics, payout automation, and reports metrics, enabling businesses to grow successful media content around creators.

name: Catnip
description: Developer of a no-code chatbot platform intended to automate communication with humans through messaging applications. The company's platform helps to build a bot without coding to automatically start conversations with prospects from post comments to increase lead generation and qualification, upsell, cross-sell, and boost revenue on WhatsApp, enabling e-commerce marketers and business owners to increase sales, reduce costs and automate support through chatbots.

name: Chouxbox
description: Developer of enterprise software technologies designed for the hospitality industry. The company provides accountants, chefs, operators, and national corporations with real-time analytics and accountability on a collaborative, cloud-based platform, helping firms manage high volumes of transactions from centralized locations.

name: Cobalt
description: Developer of a pen testing as a service platform designed to transform the traditional broken test model into a data-driven vulnerability management engine. The company's platform delivers actionable results that empower agile teams to pinpoint, track, and remediate software vulnerabilities, enabling businesses to benefit from pen test findings, faster remediation times, and higher ROI for their pen test budget.

name: CommitChange
description: Developer of an open-source software intended for fundraising and the promotion of nonprofit organizations. The company's platform offers features such as donation forms, campaign pages, event ticketing, recurring donations, email integration, and supporter profiles among others, enabling users to have complete control over their fundraising campaigns.

name: C2M
description: Developer of an online social application designed to help people chat with others anonymously. The company's application offers to create chat rooms and sort conversations according to user liking, enabling people to make new friends and stay in touch with each other.

name: Creopop
description: Developer of a three-dimensional (3D) printing pen designed to bring drawings to life without the risk of heating or melting. The company's pen is battery-operated and charged through a mini universal serial bus (USB), it uses light-sensitive ink called photopolymers that is immediately solidified by light-emitting diodes (LED) surrounding the nozzle of the pen when a button is pressed, enabling children and artists to draw their vision in three-dimension (3D).

name: Eaze
description: Operator of a cannabis software platform and marketplace intended to offer on-demand medical marijuana delivery services. The company's platform verifies the patient's medical marijuana eligibility and connects adult consumers with licensed dispensaries and products, enabling users to have safe access to legal cannabis medical marijuana via a mobile device.

name: Enuma, Inc.
description: Developer of a game-based learning application designed to support and empower children to be independent learners. The company's application offers practice and support for preschool through second-grade math skills and a flexible learning architecture that includes a suite of mini-games, books, videos, and quizzes along with a free-reign library, enabling children to gain confidence and independence while building foundational skills.

name: Equipboard
description: From the gear your heroes play to personalized rig insights, expert reviews, and the best prices—Equipboard is your music gear concierge.

name: Facturama
description: Developer of an electronic invoicing platform designed to manage a company's billing process. The company's product features the issuance, receipt and validation of invoices, payroll, payment complements, fee receipts, lease receipts, consignment notes, deductible donation receipts and credit notes, thereby enabling individuals and small and medium-sized enterprises to have control over their daily business.

name: Firstjob.me
description: We connect students and recent graduates with the best companies to work for in Latin America

name: Storyhunter
description: Developer of a freelance management platform designed to empower free expression worldwide. The company's platform automatically matches assignments with the right talent to manage projects, crews and documents in one central place, enabling businesses to connect and work together with freelancers.

name: Grab
description: Founded in 2012, Grab provides ride-sharing services, food and grocery delivery, and financial services (payments, consumer loans, and enterprise offerings) in eight Southeast-Asian countries through its mobile platform. The company partners with merchants and riders, connecting them with consumers while charging commission to both sides. Grab has a leading market share in and derives 89% of its revenue from its core businesses, ride-sharing and food delivery. Singapore and Malaysia contributed 58% of revenue as of end-2021. Grab's main competitors in Southeast Asia are Foodpanda and Gojek, the ride-sharing arm of GoTo. Its financial services business is still in its nascent stage and provides minimal revenue currently. The company now also generates advertising revenue.

name: HeadOut
description: Developer of an on-demand mobile marketplace designed to help travelers discover and book experiences and tours and to offer reliable and quality services in a fragmented industry. The company's marketplace helps to discover activities and events happening in town at a discounted prices, enabling travelers to find local experiences at the last minute.

name: Dattch
description: Developer of an online dating application designed to connect lesbian, bisexual and bi-curious women. The company's application operates a social hub where lesbians can find, meet and date like-minded people by directly sending messages, emojis and pictures, enabling users to make new friends and meet the right person as per their preference.

name: Hooked
description: Developer of a mobile media company intended to provide movies and shows to consumers. The company's proprietary technology uses artificial intelligence to predict hits based on billions of data points that are tracked at each step of the content development funnel, enabling viewers to get trending content.

name: Hornet
description: Operator of a social networking application intended to connect the members of the LGBTQ community. The company's platform utilizes a proprietary technology to establish meaningful connections between gay individuals in a refreshingly friendly environment filled with original content and news related to lifestyle, travel, entertainment and social justice, enabling people hailing from the queer community to come out and join in the fun and fabulous of the gay community.

name: Italist
description: Operator of an e-commerce fashion platform intended to offer new fashion updates from luxury brands all over the world. The company's platform offers a wide range of clothing, accessories, shoes, bags, and jewelry from all luxury brands, enabling customers to purchase authentic items at a discounted price with quality services.

name: Izif
description: Developer of music learning platform designed to offer music lessons. The company's platform teaches people how to play different musical instruments through online high-definition video tutorials, enabling people to play musical instruments on their own.

name: Já Entendi
description: Provider of educational services intended to cater to the needs of blue-collar workers. The company's services include online professional training and capacity building the company through video classes with an exclusive methodology for workers at the base of the pyramid that helps to leverage blue-collar workers transforming content like books, booklets and manuals into video lessons, enabling workers with skilled knowledge in various fields to work efficiently.

name: Kango
description: Operator of the ridesharing platform intended to help parents schedule rides and childcare for kids. The company offers to schedule a ride, childcare, or both and provides background-checked, fingerprinted caregivers who are trained to transport kids along with real-time updates and tracking of driver location, enabling parents and schools to book safe rides and childcare for children without hassle.

name: Kiko Labs
description: Developer of neuroscience-based adaptive games designed to target the skills for school success. The company's application is designed to challenge cognitive learning skills such as memory, focus, and reasoning which are necessary groundwork for learning in kindergarten and beyond, helping children develop their minds.

name: Knote
description: Developer of a note-taking application intended to help businesses to streamline their work in an organized way. The company's application combines smooth note-taking features, a visual organization system and unlimited file storage to offer email, sticky notes and a file cabinet in one package, enabling users to eliminate the daily stand-up meetings and make things smooth and efficient.

name: Kodable
description: Developer of programming curriculum software intended to make programming education accessible to children. The company's platform translates computer science into easy-to-teach lessons and games that kids love and offers scripted lesson plans, and automated assessment tools among others, enabling teachers and parents to teach computer science to tomorrow's innovators and explore the universe of coding problems, solving math, and language arts.

name: Konfio

The company's platform complements traditional financial analysis and helps clients achieve economic growth through access to credit options with a proprietary algorithm that combines data and technology to measure creditworthiness, providing convenience and affordability to customers who are creditworthy but historically under-served by traditional banking, enabling small businesses to grow their operations and businesses with competitive rates.

name: MyPowerSupply
description: Operator of a meal discovery platform intended to offer professionally prepared healthy meals. The company specializes in offering personalized meals pre-made and designed by local dietitians, nutritionists and chefs using good quality, sustainably sourced ingredients free of refined sugars, gluten and dairy for health-conscious consumers, enabling customers to indulge in freshly prepared food delivered to their doorstep.

name: Omvana
description: Operator of an education investment group intended to build and invest in education businesses. The company publishes ideas and teachings by good authors in personal growth, wellbeing, spirituality, productivity, mindfulness and more and combines them with cutting-edge sophisticated learning technology, thereby helping users with their growth.

name: Mogul
description: Operator of artificial intelligence-enabled business-to-business candidate sourcing platform designed for recruiters to comprehensively and inclusively source candidates. The company's diverse recruitment platform and resources attract diverse talent from entry-level to executive and board-level worldwide through its software and executive recruitment services, enabling clients to achieve their goals and cultivate meaningful success.

name: Neuroware.io
description: Developer of blockchain applications designed to properly leverage the benefits of distributed ledger technologies. The company's applications develop a range of specialized non-financial protocols for the blockchains and open-source e-wallet technology that runs entirely in the browser and can be embedded into anything that supports local storage, as well as the services, combine on-chain data storage, decentralized identity, and authentication and public key logistics, enabling clients to get training, education, and awareness for exploring blockchain technology.

name: Node.io
description: Developer of a networking analytics platform. The company's platform leverages proprietary artificial intelligence technology to automatically deliver relevant and timely information about people and companies to help understand who they should engage with and why enabling organizations to discover the target markets, customers and hire employees to grow their business.

name: Nubity
description: Developer of a centralized platform designed to integrate public and private cloud services. The company's platform integrates all the clouds and servers in a single interface that facilitates to management and monitor the infrastructure, enabling companies to monitor and delegate the administration and management of information technology infrastructure.

name: Olist
description: Operator of an online e-commerce site aggregation intended to facilitate direct sales on sites. The company's platform connects entrepreneurs with major online retailers and allows them to advertise and sell in the marketplaces without complication, enabling retail companies to reach out to the international marketplaces, improve the shopping experience and modify their purchasing behavior.

name: Rain
description: Developer of a location-based marketing application designed to promote businesses. The company offers marketing software that helps businesses reach local customers with mobile and local marketing technologies to buy and monitor local advertisements, enabling clients to target ideal customers based on multiple data points.

name: Orori
description: Manufactuer of luxury jewelry intended to offer various types of accessories to customers to choose from. The company's portal permits users to trade second-hand jewelry and scrap gold for refinement and offers gold, diamonds, and other designer and custom-made jewelry including gold bars as well, enabling customers to choose from a wide range of options as well as get customized jewelry.

name: Partender
description: Developer of bar inventory management software designed for reducing dead stock and eliminating waste or theft. The company's software reduces the time taken by owners and managers to do bar inventory from hours to minutes by digitizing the archaic paper-pen-clipboard process into a few taps and swipes on smartphones, enabling bar managers to gain deeper insights into the inventory levels of their bars.

name: Pinshape
description: Provider of an online 3D printing platform. The company allows users to explore, share, download, and order 3D prints through their professional 3D print service.

name: Pomelo fashion
description: Operator of an online e-commerce marketplace intended to offer fashion clothes and accessories. The company's marketplace offers clothes, shoes, and accessories for the fashion-forward consumer and works with designers to create house brand products, enabling consumers to bring more statements into their style.

name: Promolta
description: Operator of a self-serve video distribution platform intended to promote various YouTube videos. The company's online platform leverages technology to help musicians and artists distribute their videos on targeted blogs, sites, games, apps, and social networks, enabling clients to increase their reach and awareness.

name: Puzzlium
description: Developer of a web-based puzzle-solving platform designed for recreational and educational purposes. The company's platform offers a wide variety of puzzles, riddles, and brain teasers, enabling users to engage in challenging and stimulating activities that promote problem-solving skills, critical thinking, and mental agility for individuals of all ages and interests.

name: Rachio

The company's technology saves watering bills using a laptop or smartphone to schedule watering times, forecasts soil and plant type, and sun exposure, and customizes the watering schedule, enabling users to save water and money.

name: Remoov
description: Provider of decluttering services intended to reduce waste by increasing recycling and reuse of products. The company services collect all the items the client wants to sell, donate, or discard with one pickup, and the collected items are then handled through consignment sales, donations, or recycling, enabling users to declutter their homes.

name: Rooster

The company's studio offers curated mobile reading service, virtual reality adaptation of novels, recovers classics, creates motion stories, and powers a subway library, enabling readers to have free access to hundreds of e-books, excerpts, and short stories.

name: Rover
description: Provider of mobile campaign platform designed to drive mobile engagement and monetization with enhanced mobile campaigns. The company's mobile campaign platform offers to design rich, native experiences in the browser and create a sponsored activation of any event, a mobile campaign experience or even an interactive trivia game, enabling clients to deliver the mobile content to the right audience and the right time.

name: Popout

The company's platform provides an API and dashboard to assist merchants and platforms in getting real-time rates, printing labels, automating international paperwork, tracking packages, and facilitating returns, enabling businesses to find suitable delivery option that matches their requirements.

name: Shots Mobile
description: Operator of a creator network intended to provide media management services to influencers and celebrities. The company creates original mobile-first content, primarily for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok and Snapchat, enabling creators to easily manage their content and its promotions.

name: Silkroad Images
description: Operator of stock photography and editorial content library intended to capture, accurately portray and disseminate the culture and traditions of the Middle East and beyond. The company's library offers photographic images and digital content such as vectors, sound effects, VAS images, and editorials segmented into multiple categories and sourced from experienced photographers, enabling clients to enjoy authentic oriental Middle East-focused photographs and videos.

name: Slidebean

The company's platform utilizes artificial intelligence-powered online presentation tools to separate content from design and provides a fill-in-the-blank outline to create presentation workflows, enabling users to make a presentation by simply inputting information, regardless of their technical expertise or design skills.

name: Stripe

The company's platform offers a developer-centric, application programming interface-driven payments platform that simplifies payment infrastructure complexity and also provides a suite of ancillary commerce enablements and financial services products, enabling clients to accept payments, send payouts and manage their businesses online.

name: Likeplum

The company's platform helps solve questions of the students by connecting them with tutors who can provide quick explanations to their queries, enabling students to keep the learning process going without getting frustrated and losing their passion for academic subjects.

name: StudySoup
description: Developer of a peer-to-peer learning platform intended to share knowledge and study materials. The company's learning platform helps to sell and purchase class notes and study guides, enabling students to get relevant study content on their path to higher education.

name: SwipeRx

The company's system generates insights to collaborate more effectively with pharmacies, heightens pharmacist education, strengthens market access, optimizes commercial strategies, improves day-to-day operational efficiencies, and gives real-time access to patient and sell-out data, enabling clients to advance patient affordability, access, and adherence.

name: Thinglink

The company's platform offers an online interactive identification tool that makes clickable tags on images on the web and helps to share the tagged images on social networks and images for blogs, social channels, and advertising, enabling companies to create memorable interactive digital experiences and attract customers.

name: Thinknum

The company's platform aggregates data from the web that provides insights into business drivers and offers pre-configured maps, charts, word clouds, and visualizations to understand the data, enabling investors with critical data points.

name: Shelf

The company's platform offers simple tools with a modern and digital trip planning experience, enabling businesses to book clients and run their travel business effectively with simple invoicing and secure payments.

name: UXCam

The company's tool works in the background without any performance penalty and helps to record and analyze user experiences while understanding the problems and bugs in their applications, enabling businesses to understand how users use the product and understand where they get frustrated.

name: VaultDragon

The company's software digitizes medical records and helps to generate customizable reports with a real-time syncing facility that complements financial reports and research, enabling clinics to streamline their workflow, in turn, providing efficient delivery of healthcare.

name: Venzee

It develops and markets a cloud-based platform that suppliers and manufacturers from multiple industries use to share their product information and inventory updates, in real-time, with their retailers. The Company operates in one operating segment, which is a cloud-based platform solution targeted to online retailers and vendors. Geographically, the company generates a majority of revenue from the United States.

name: VonBox
description: Developer of a customer communications platform designed to offer all-in-one system and text messaging services for modern businesses. The company's platform assists businesses to reach customers at the right time and connect them to agents through chat-based text message support, enabling businesses to manage all inbound customer queries in a team inbox with the context needed to write personalized replies and provide timely support.

name: Wanderu

The company's engine helps to book buses, trains, and flight tickets online, view past reservations and save frequently searched trips, enabling travelers to find and compare tickets for convenient and cost-effective itineraries.

name: XtGem
description: Developer of a visual mobile site building tool designed to build and maintain mobile sites. The company's tool helps to build a fully-featured, completely-customizable mobile site in a very short period of time, enabling users to build and maintain mobile sites, even without any programming knowledge.

name: Zolvers
description: Operator of an online platform intended to connect customers with service providers for errands. The company's marketplace helps people to outsource errands such as cleaning, home or office maintenance, and any short pending task, enabling people to complete housework at a reasonable cost.

name: Zoomforth

The company's platform helps to gather rich media content to support a specific campaign or target a particular audience, as well as deploys online presentations and pages for sales, recruiting, and learning development purposes, enabling clients to create customized websites, track content engagement in real-time and avail valuable insights.

name: Tradegecko

The company's platform integrates front-end e-commerce and POS software with back-end accounting and shipping software, enabling SMBs to manage their inventory efficiently, process orders quickly and change the pricing of their products dynamically.

name: Intap Labs
description: Provider of a cloud-based platform intended to offer language and culture learning services. The company's platform offers an application software which hosts intuitive audio-visual language, lessons and practice widgets in different languages, enabling learners to build their English vocabulary and in other languages.

name: PredictionIO
description: Developer of an open-source, machine-learning server. The company offers a machine learning platform for software developers and data engineers to create predictive features, such as personalization, recommendation and content discovery.

name: Revivn
description: Provider of electronic recycling services designed to re-purpose unused hardware to under-served communities. The company's electronic recycling services include collecting excess hardware from organizational sites and re-purposing them for communities in need by providing a detailed hardware inventory and certifying data destruction and ethical recycling, enabling organizations to re-purpose their unused technical gadgets and hardware for a greater cause.

name: Shopline

The company's e-commerce platform allows merchants to apply for one free custom domain for their shop and provides professional and well-designed to customize their storefront, enabling them to launch an online shop in minutes, no coding required.

name: Famebit
description: Operator of a marketplace for businesses to find, hire and work with YouTube influencers for product and service endorsements. The company streamlines the whole process from connection to video delivery by providing self-serve tools that allow businesses to deploy YouTube marketing campaigns for product endorsement such as product reviews, tutorials and hauls.

name: Skry
description: Developer of block-chain analytics and intelligence platform designed to manage, visualize and analyse blockchain data from disparate sources. The company's Skry platform uses latest Artificial Intelligence technologies allowing people to extract insights at a speed and scale that no human can on their own and provides easy access to actionable insights in real-time through its APIs and visual interfaces, enabling enterprises to derive real-time intelligence and risk assessment from block-chains and decentralized applications.

name: Health Co (Stealth)
description: Provider of massage therapy services. The company provides massage and wellness services to the customers at their own convenience.

name: PTA Networks
description: Operator of a digital streaming network. The company operates a digital streaming network that is focused on travel and lifestyle content.

name: TotSpot
description: Provider of a peer-to-peer mobile marketplace designed to sell children's fashion clothing. The company's peer-to-peer mobile marketplace features an intuitive and sleek interface that provides fast, easy and safe parent-to-parent transactions, while offering an outlet for family focused communities to inspire and learn from one another, enabling users to shop and sell clothes for kids.

name: CourseGuide
description: Provider of an online guide platform designed to be used for the search and discovery of Web development boot camps. The company's online guide platform provides a host of data points and student reviews, enabling coders to find schools for their needs and desired outcomes.

name: YouScan

The company's lead generation tools analyzes millions of public social media posts and uses sophisticated language processing algorithms to find social media messages that express an intention to buy a certain product or service, enabling businesses that provide relevant products or services to reach out to the author of the messages.

name: Eloquii

The company's e-commerce platform offers contemporary fast fashion, with everything from dresses to outerwear to shoes, in sizes 14 to 28 and offers customers access to unique content through its Style & Substance blog and curated catalog, enabling plus-size women to dress and participate in fashion.

name: Cloud Academy
description: Provider of an online learning platform designed to helps both companies and individuals to learn cloud computing technologies. The company's online learning platform helps both companies and individual users learn everything about cloud computing, provides content and training and helps experts prove their knowledge by solving tests and helps companies to easily find them, enabling companies and individuals to learn cloud computing technology.

name: TT Labs

The company's video platform utilizes the SaaS platform for adding videos online to communicate and sell via online product videos, enabling retailers, gaming companies and individuals to hire the video professionals at a range of price points, to fit any budget and make trailers, using in-game footage or product videos and air the same on national TV.

name: ChangeTip

name: Ohmconnect

The company's platform monitors real-time conditions on the electricity grid, by receiving notifications to save energy by turning off lights during or by switching off appliances and then pays the consumers for the energy they saved, enabling them to have a positive environmental impact and benefit from the value they've generated.

name: Innohub
description: Developer of automated data analysis and visualization platform designed to make data accessible and insightful. The company's automated data analysis and visualization platform offers data automation, data integration and analysis, enabling companies and their employees to request, analyze and visualize internal business data to quickly capitalize on hidden trends and improve organizational productivity.

name: ZipMatch
description: Provider of a real estate brokerage and listing platform designed to offer real estate trends information. The company's real estate brokerage and listing platform offers interactive visual content like 360-degreemore

name: VCNC
description: Provider of an online application platform intended for the couple to share photos and messages through their phone. The company's platform includes secret community, enabling users to chat privately anywhere.

name: Freckle Education
description: Provider of a mathematics education program designed to meet the needs of every student through individualized Math, ELA and Social Studies resources. The company's mathematics education platform brings together the best in technology and great teaching to create unique, modern didactic experiences and makes a mathematics tablet program that adapts to students' capabilities in real time, enabling students to practice common core aligned math at their own pace and their teachers can tailor instruction for each student.

name: Zesty
description: Provider of an on-demand food ordering application designed to offer food booking and delivery services. The company's application provides its restaurant partners with predictable, incremental revenue by leveraging their excess capacity and brand affinity as well as helps restaurants to reach a bigger audience, enabling consumers to order fresh meals from local restaurants.

name: Bucket
description: Developer of online holiday trip ideas sharing application. The company provides facility to save places from travel sites like TripAdvisor and Lonely Planet, and friends' recommendations from email and social networks.

name: Modest
description: Developer of mobile shopping application. The company assists retailers to monetize their products by generating a product list, as a result for the searches conducted by shoppers, by studying their shopping history, similar shoppers, taste and preferences.

name: Lendsquare
description: Provider of a crowdfunding platform. The company's platform allows small businesses to finance growth by borrowing money from their customers and communities.

name: 3DaGoGo
description: Provider of a 3D printing software platform. The company offers a free, open, cloud platform and application marketplace designed for 3D Printing. Its cloud-based platform allows 3D Printer owners to manage their printers from anywhere around the world.

name: Zumata
description: Developer of a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) travel technology designed to solve complex problems. The company's technology uses artificial intelligence and machine learning capabilities to offer internet booking engines and travel content, enabling companies to overcome the many challenges of accommodation distribution, increase speed to market and maximize profit from each sale.

name: PlayCanvas
description: Developer of a visual development platform for interactive web content. The company's visual editing tool lets users build scenes, applications and games in record time, manage project assets, to add interactivity and to communicate and work with the team, enabling developers to build, share and play video game through real-time collaboration.

name: Pop Up Archive
description: Provider of a search engine for digital media. The company provides a platform which takes sound from anywhere and automatically creates timestamped transcripts and keywords, indexed so that users can play back search terms.

name: Breaker
description: Tokyo-based social media branding agency connecting the world to Japan.

name: Insightful Labs
description: Provider of a personalization marketing automation platform. The company offers an online platform that helps its users to manage customer life cycle through personalization, targeting and big data analytics.

name: HelloFlo
description: Provider of a subscription-based online business that delivers feminine products. The company provides products, services and everyday health and wellness resources and it also encourages women empowerment management.

name: Beeline Bikes
description: Provider of an online mobile bike shop intended to reinvent how people interact with bike shops. The company's bike shop includes a technology platform, support infrastructure and supply chain, enabling customers to schedule a visit at the time and location of their choosing.

name: ShareRoot
description: Provider of an online marketing platform. The company provides a social marketing suite to help large brands drive and measure Pinterest engagement.

name: Salido
description: Developer of a restaurant operating system platform designed to manage customer data easily. The company's platform is a cloud-based application that offers a point of sale, CRM, advanced reports, labor management and kitchen supply management, enabling restaurant owners to manage and keep track of their data accurately.

name: 3DPrinterOS
description:
3DPrinterOS has developed the world’s first operating system for desktop 3D Printers. Almost identical to the early days of the computer, where Microsoft provided the operating system for the first IBM PC in 1981. 3DPrinterOS now powers Bosch Dremel 3D Printers which are readily available for sales worldwide and at local stores like Home Depot and Amazon. The easy to use cloud OS platform disrupts the fragmentation in the industry by supporting the most 3D Printers vs. customers forced to use disparate software from every manufacturer. The decentralized platform has built over 150,000 parts in over 100 countries, and doubled in 3 months. Top universities like Duke and companies like Cisco have adopted the technology to allow for direct real-time access to these digital manufacturing machines remotely from any web-enabled device and are able build parts in real-time. 15M+ desktop units are expected to be sold by 2025 and the company is on track to become a de facto platform as it just recently displaced Autodesk's Spark platform, making it the number #1 3D desktop printing operating system in the industry.

The world’s first operating system for 3d printers. 3DPrinterOS is the only platform that gives users the ability to search or upload 3d printable content, quickly and easily repair designs, customize settings, slice in the cloud and send files for printing anywhere in the world. 3D Printer owners and new users alike can share CAD files and multiple 3D Printers all from a single cloud interface. For the first time in history, anyone with a 3D Printer can plug in, connect their 3D Printer to the cloud and share printers for access from anywhere, anytime and from any web-enabled device. www.3dprinteros.com 3DPrinterOS graduated from VentureBeat’s “2013 Accelerator of the Year” Alchemist Accelerator in the San Francisco bay area and was seed-round backed by Vulcan Capital and other private investors. Founded in 2013, 3DPrinterOS is based in San Francisco.
